snippets.content:
Manage the current worktree through the full Git lifecycle, non-destructively:
1. Inspect state: git status -sb, git remote -v, git branch --show-current, git log --oneline -5, git diff, git diff --staged.
2. Resolve the base branch from origin/HEAD (fall back to main). git fetch --prune. Fast-forward only when on the base and clean.
3. If on the base with changes, create a feature branch first: <type>/<slug> (feat|fix|docs|refactor|test|chore), lowercase hyphen slug, no model/vendor names.
4. Work in semantic slices; commit each before the next. Conventional Commits, imperative, lowercase, no trailing period, ≤72 chars; explain "why" in the body when needed. Never add LLM/agent attribution; keep the configured git identity.
5. Before each commit: git diff --check --cached and scan the staged diff for secrets. Run the repo's verification (here: make health).
6. Push the feature branch with -u. Never push to the base. No --force, reset --hard, or clean without explicit consent.
7. Open a PR with gh pr create (Summary / Verification / Notes); if one exists, report its URL.
Report branch, commits, PR URL, verification, and anything skipped.
snippets.description: Full non-destructive Git lifecycle: branch, atomic commits, push, PR.
snippets.name: Super Git

snippets.content:
Produce a structured checkpoint of the current session:
- Date and branch.
- Done this session: concrete list of changes.
- Pending: what remains and where.
- Decisions made, with brief justification.
- Next steps on resume.
Output it in chat by default. If it must persist, write it under .ai/tasks/<date>-<slug>/checkpoint.md — not at the repo root. No filler.
snippets.name: Checkpoint

snippets.content:
Review the uncommitted diff (git diff) on two axes at once:
- Correctness: logic errors, edge cases, race conditions, layer violations, perf cliffs.
- Security: input validation, authn/authz, secret exposure, injection, insecure defaults, dependency risk.
If both are clean, say "Ready to commit". Otherwise list blocking issues grouped by axis as `file:line — issue → fix` and wait for a decision. Do not commit.
snippets.description: Review + security pass over the uncommitted diff.
snippets.name: Check Last
